_comment: Mullvad VPN auto-rotation on rate-limit. COPY this to 'vpn_config.json' (gitignored) and edit. Leave rotate_locations EMPTY ([]) to disable. The mullvad CLI is auto-detected; set cli_path only to override. Tiered: at restart_threshold rate-limit events we RESTART the site's bots on the same IP first; only if it keeps climbing to rotate_threshold do we ROTATE the Mullvad exit. See VPN_SETUP.md.
